mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_token_usage ( student_id, course_id, class_id, workflow_id, execution_id, workspace_id, model_name, input_tokens, output_tokens, total_tokens, cost_usd, duration_ms, trigger_type, status, error_message, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{studentId}, #{courseId}, #{classId}, #{workflowId}, #{executionId}, #{workspaceId}, #{modelName}, #{inputTokens}, #{outputTokens}, #{totalTokens}, #{costUsd}, #{durationMs}, #{triggerType}, #{status}, #{errorMessage}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
